title: phalaris peruviana
intro: Phalaris peruviana, also known as canary grass or Peruvian canary grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Phalaris peruviana include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its seeds can be used to create an oil that can be applied topically.
